# Mikhail Simakhov

> Student who builds AI agent systems and uses them every day. A-levels in Computer Science, Physics, and Maths in Cambridge, UK, from September 2026, on an academic scholarship.

Mike is interested in how people actually use AI, and how you test what a model can really do. He builds and runs his own agent systems and study tools.

## Projects

- [Horizon](https://msimakhov-star.github.io/#projects): an always-on autonomous agent driven over Telegram in Russian or English. It plans a task, a council of AI reviewers votes on the plan, a specialist agent does the work, and it reports back. Python, Claude CLI, Telegram Bot API, Linux server.
- [Case Dojo](https://msimakhov-star.github.io/#projects): an offline-first web app for studying business thinking, with spaced repetition, worked cases, and an optional AI coach. React, Vite, Express, Claude API.
- [Summer Calendar](https://msimakhov-star.github.io/#projects): a personal summer tracker web app backed by plain JSON files in git. Python, vanilla JS.

## Links

- [Website](https://msimakhov-star.github.io/): full profile and project write-ups.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mikhail-simakhov-2706123b4/): where he posts analysis of AI developments.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/msimakhov-star): code.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/my_daily_ai/): short-form AI content.
